_meta.description: Adhesives, coatings, lubricants, and elastomers. Outgassing values are representative entries in the style of the NASA GSFC outgassing database (outgassing.nasa.gov); cure schedule and lot matter, verify the exact product before flight use.

materials.name: RTV 566

outgassing.source: GSFC-style representative E595 result, low-volatility space-grade silicone

materials.notes: Low-outgassing space-grade RTV; silicone contamination risk near optics regardless of CVCM.

materials.name: RTV 560

outgassing.source: GSFC-style representative E595 result; CVCM near the 0.10 limit

materials.notes: Usable but CVCM is borderline; prefer 566 near contamination-sensitive surfaces.

materials.name: Scotch-Weld EC-2216 B/A
materials.notes: Classic cryo-tolerant structural adhesive; retains toughness at 77 K better than rigid epoxies.

materials.name: Hysol EA 9394
materials.notes: High-strength paste adhesive used in launch vehicle bonding.

materials.name: Stycast 2850FT
materials.notes: Cryogenic potting standard; thermal contraction matched to metals better than unfilled epoxies.

materials.name: Braycote 601EF
materials.notes: Default vacuum grease for spaceflight mechanisms.

materials.name: Apiezon N

outgassing.source: GSFC-style representative E595 result; fails both limits

materials.notes: Excellent cryogenic thermal-contact grease for lab use, but fails E595 badly; keep out of flight vacuum hardware.

materials.name: Aeroglaze Z306

outgassing.source: GSFC-style representative E595 result; TML at the limit, bakeout-sensitive

materials.notes: Standard black thermal-control/stray-light coating; requires bakeout, TML right at the 1.0 limit.

materials.name: Viton A
materials.notes: Common seal material; glass transition ~ 250 K, NOT usable as a cryogenic seal.

materials.name: Buna-N (nitrile)

outgassing.source: GSFC-style representative E595 result; fails both limits

materials.notes: Fails E595 and flammability; ground-support use only.
